summary: * Intensity buffs are more effective depending on how many stacks of the buff you have. {{TOC limit|2}}

== Attributes ==

=== Stack Types ===
* '''Intensity buffs''' are more effective depending on how many stacks of the buff you have. These buffs typically are either permanent for the combat encounter or are consumed on the following turn.
* '''Duration buffs''' last for as many turns as you have stacks of the buff. At the end of the turn, the buff will decrement by one stack.
* '''Counter buffs''' activate when an event happens. Counter buffs typically lose a stack each time they activate.
* Buffs that do not stack are typically gained from Power cards and last the entire combat encounter.

=== Behavior Between Turns===
* Buffs that are '''Permanent''' are not removed by normal means.
* Buffs that are '''Conserved''' will be unaffected as the turn passes.
* Buffs that are '''Decremented''' will lose one stack as the turn passes.
* Buffs that are '''Removed''' will lose all stacks with no effect as the turn passes.
* Buffs that are '''Consumed''' will lose all stacks upon triggering an effect at the start of the next turn.
* Buffs that are '''Reset''' will reset all counters to an initial value at the start of the next turn.
